effect_summary: Produced a source-only P2 readiness audit packet. The packet confirms P0/P1 source artifacts are complete enough for audit handoff but explicitly marks operational P2 runtime, exchange, proof, promotion, order-capable, Bybit/MCP, PG, IPC, Decision Lease, Cost Gate, _latest, serving, delete/apply, cron, daemon, scheduler, and live/mainnet readiness as NOT_APPLIED and BLOCKED_BOUNDARY until a future exact-scope gate is opened.
blocked_boundary_for_true_p2: runtime SSH, service restart/rebuild/deploy, env mutation, secret handling
PG read/write/DDL/migration, including V151 proposal implementation
IPC listener/writer, Decision Lease acquisition, adapter/writer enablement, engine socket
Bybit REST/WS public or private contact, fee/account/private reads, official MCP, order endpoints
_latest overwrite, symlink promotion, model reload, serving promotion, Cost Gate change, proof promotion

verification.command: python3 -m json.tool docs/CCAgentWorkSpace/PM/workspace/reports/2026-07-09--scanner_driven_alr_p2_readiness_audit.work_item.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/CCAgentWorkSpace/PM/workspace/reports/2026-07-09--scanner_driven_alr_p2_readiness_audit.effect_review.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool docs/CCAgentWorkSpace/PM/workspace/reports/2026-07-09--scanner_driven_alr_p2_readiness_audit.state_packet.json >/dev/null
git diff --check -- <owned P2 readiness audit files>

concerns: This packet is a readiness audit only and is NOT_APPLIED for runtime, exchange, proof, promotion, order-capable, PG, IPC, Bybit, official MCP, Cost Gate, _latest, serving, delete/apply, cron, daemon, scheduler, and live/mainnet work.
P1-B persistence remains proposal-only and DONE_WITH_CONCERNS; V151 is not created or applied.
P0 boundary packet remains DONE_WITH_CONCERNS to prevent proposal text from being mistaken for applied ADR/AMD/root TODO authority.
No candidate-matched fills, proof packets, or reward ledgers were produced in this source-only loop.
Future work must open a new exact scope and pass PM -> E3 -> BB -> PM before any runtime or exchange-facing action.
